statement.en: Investigating the spatial pathology of fibrosis and inflammation in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a thesis under embargo (full abstract and content not yet publicly available). The work exists as a provisional/unpublished document with restricted access. Classification cannot be firm until content is released and validated by peer review. The 2026 date suggests future/preprint status relative to typical publication timelines.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 肺の奥へ進むほど、瘢痕と炎症が呼吸を奪い、沈黙へ向かう。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 肺胞を侵食する炎症と瘢痕の絡み合い、そこに静寂が棲み着く。
